title: amyema miraculosa subsp. boormanii
intro: Amyema miraculosa subsp. boormanii, also known as Boorman's Mistletoe, is a subspecies of mistletoe that is native to Western Australia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Boorman's Mistletoe include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Amyema miraculosa subsp. boormanii typically involve infusion of the plant's leaves in hot water or the use of extracts in capsule or tincture form.
